## Quality Preferences
- Note titles MUST be declarative affirmative statements (testable: can be true or false)
  - GOOD: "Le cache fetch de Next.js 15 utilise no-store par defaut"
  - BAD: "Notes sur le cache Next.js 15"
- Essentiel section: max 3 lines, reformulated in own words (never copied from source)
- Prefer concrete implementation examples over theoretical completeness
- Flag concepts that contradict existing vault notes
- Tier S: directly applicable to gpparts or second-brain pipeline
- Tier A: solid concept with future value
- Tier B: interesting reference, 1 sentence summary sufficient
